Added_Camera/UI.purpose: Makes it easier for players to see and interact with player profiles.

Added_Camera/UI.name: FFlagUnifiedPurchaseFlowMarketplaceUIImprovementsV3_Staged
Added_Camera/UI.mechanism: Streamlines the purchasing process in the marketplace with a unified interface.
Added_Camera/UI.purpose: Makes buying items easier and more intuitive for players.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Links game versions to specific code changes using Git hash strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players are using the latest features and fixes, enhancing game stability.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Modifies how dynamic strings with timestamps are handled.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the accuracy and reliability of time-related information shown to players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Utilizes a fast string representation of the Git hash for repository management.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance in loading and managing game assets.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the handling of timestamp strings for faster processing.
Changed_Other.purpose: Increases performance when displaying or manipulating time-related data in games.

Removed_Camera/UI.name: FFlagPeoplePageCardMenuUseVisibleProperty_Staged

Removed_Camera/UI.purpose: Improves the user interface by making it easier to see relevant information.
